prompt: Generate an image using the reference composition of three people looking at a screen. Overlay their faces with digital analysis graphics like bounding boxes and keypoints, illustrating facial estimation in computer graphics.
prompt_refined: Generate an image featuring three people, positioned similarly to the subjects in image 1, all intently looking down at a screen (such as a laptop) in front of them. Overlay digital analysis graphics, including bounding boxes and facial keypoints, onto each of the three faces to visually illustrate facial estimation in computer graphics.
objects: People positioned similarly to subjects in image 1
A screen (such as a laptop) in front of the people
Bounding boxes on each of the three faces
Facial keypoints on each of the three faces
